---
title: "Blogdown scientific online publishing"
id: activity-gis-reproducible-research-blogdown
order: 302
summary: "Blogdown: RMarkdown powered by Hugo, from R script to website."
source_url: "https://thinking-spatial.org/courses/geoinformationen_kommunizieren/kurs6/"
modules:
  - gis-reproducible-research
Goals: []
materials:
  - material-gis-reproducible-research-intro
assessments: []
labels:
  - advanced
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/gis-reproducible-research/activity-gis-reproducible-research-blogdown.md"
---

Open the Blogdown resource:

<https://thinking-spatial.org/courses/geoinformationen_kommunizieren/kurs6/>

## Connected Module

- [Reproducible Research](../modules/gis-reproducible-research.qmd)
